file_changes.confirm_revert_description: The workspace changes only when the reverse patch applies safely. Later changes are never overwritten.
file_changes.large_diff_single_file_notice: This diff is large, so only one file is shown at a time
file_changes.device_offline: The device is offline. Review and revert are unavailable.
file_changes.conflicted: Later changes conflict, so the workspace was not modified
file_changes.artifact_missing: The change artifact is no longer available

context_length_exceeded.title: The conversation is too long for this model's context window
context_length_exceeded.description: Try a model with a larger context window, or start a fresh conversation.

quota_exceeded.title: The model's usage quota has been exhausted
quota_exceeded.description: Switch to another available model, or continue after quota is restored.

rate_limit.title: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again
rate_limit.description: Wait briefly and retry, or switch to another available model.

payload_too_large.title: Content too large: conversation history or attachment exceeds the limit
payload_too_large.description: Reduce attachments or context content, then retry.

network_error.title: Network error: Please check your connection and try again
network_error.description: The connection was interrupted or the service is temporarily unreachable.

timeout_error.title: Request timeout: Service response time exceeded
timeout_error.description: The service did not respond in time. Try sending the message again later.

llm_error.title: Model error: The model is temporarily unavailable
llm_error.description: The model service is unavailable. Try again later or switch models.

llm_unsupported.title: Current model does not support this request
llm_unsupported.description: This input or attachment type is not supported by the model. Switch to a compatible model.

invalid_parameter.title: Invalid parameter: Request parameters are incorrect
invalid_parameter.description: The request does not match the model requirements. Adjust the input and retry.

forbidden.title: Access denied: You do not have permission to use this resource
forbidden.description: Check your account, device, or model permissions and retry.

container_oom.title: Executor out of memory
container_oom.description: Start a new conversation to retry, or contact an administrator to increase memory.

container_error.title: Task service error
container_error.description: The container or runtime task service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.

content_filter.title: Content triggered security review and was rejected
content_filter.description: Modify the parts that may trigger the safety policy and retry.

provider_error.title: Model service error. Please try again later
provider_error.description: The upstream model service returned an error. Retry later or switch models.

image_too_large.title: Image exceeds size limit. Please compress the image and retry
image_too_large.description: Compress the image or reduce the number of images, then send again.

model_protocol_error.title: Model and runtime protocol do not match
model_protocol_error.description: The current model does not support this request format. Switch to a compatible model and retry.
model_protocol_error.description_with_model: {{model}} does not support the current runtime protocol. Switch to a compatible model and retry.

invalid_role.title: Model parameter error: Message role format is incompatible
invalid_role.description: The current model does not support this message format. Switch models and retry.

permission_denied.title: No permission to use the current model
permission_denied.description: Check model access permissions, or switch to a model within your permissions.

generic_error.title: Message generation failed
generic_error.description: The request could not be completed. Try again later, or view the error details.
generic_error.description_without_details: The request could not be completed. Try again later.
